name: Lúth-Azureleap
personality: Equal parts silk-topped and formidable, this rabbit's star-shaped eyes ensure it has never rage-quit a failing test suite. Its coat shimmers with the quality of code it has never written carelessly. Downside: Lúth-Azureleap has never once been sarcastic in a PR comment, not even accidentally. Upside: thumps one foot impatiently during slow CI pipelines.
